content.speakerText: What do you think sets you apart from other candidates?
content.speakerTextCn: 你觉得你和别人比有什么特别之处？

options.text: I'm just an average worker, but I try my best.
I combine strong analytics skills with real empathy—I understand both data and people.
I guess I'm lucky and get along well with people.
I don't know, maybe I'm just not as bad as others.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体技能（analytics skills）+ 具体优势（empathy）+ 实例化表达（understand both data and people），符合面试中优势表达的黄金法则。其他选项要么贬低自己（opt_1, opt_4），要么空泛无据（opt_3），缺乏专业性和说服力。

content.speakerText: Can you tell me one key strength that makes you a strong fit for this role?
content.speakerTextCn: 你能告诉我一个让你非常适合这个职位的关键优势吗？

options.text: I'm good at working with computers.
I led a cross-functional team to deliver a project two weeks ahead of schedule by improving communication workflows.
I like my job and I’m not lazy.
My friends say I’m a nice person.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体行为（led a team）、成果（delivered ahead of schedule）和方法（improving workflows），符合STAR原则，极具说服力。其他选项过于笼统（opt_1）、情绪化（opt_3）或非专业（opt_4），无法体现职业竞争力。

content.speakerText: How do you handle tight deadlines?
content.speakerTextCn: 你如何应对紧迫的截止日期？

options.text: I usually panic a little, but then I get it done.
I prioritize tasks, break them into smaller steps, and communicate early if there’s a risk—this helped me deliver 10+ projects on time last year.
I work late a lot—that’s just what I do.
I don’t really get deadlines—they’re not that important.

content.explanation: 正确答案展示了系统性方法（prioritize, break down, communicate）+ 量化成果（10+ projects），体现专业性和结果导向。opt_1 显得不专业，opt_3 强调加班而非效率，opt_4 完全错误，不符合职场价值观。

content.template: I combine strong ___ skills with real empathy—I understand both data and people.
content.hint: 这是面试中常用来描述数据驱动型优势的关键词

content.template: I'm super ___—I never miss deadlines, even under pressure.
content.hint: 表达个人职业品质的核心形容词，常用于强调责任心

content.template: I learn fast—I ___ up Python in a month for my last project.
content.hint: 表示‘快速学会’的地道动词短语，常用于口语表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定搭配（pick up a skill）

content.speakerText: What do you think sets you apart from other candidates?
content.speakerTextCn: 你觉得你和别人比有什么特别之处？
expectedAnswers: I have a unique blend of technical expertise and emotional intelligence—I can translate complex data into actionable insights that teams actually use.
I’m highly adaptable and have successfully switched roles twice in my career, mastering new systems in under 30 days each time.
I consistently deliver high-quality work under pressure—I once managed three critical projects simultaneously and delivered all on time with zero errors.
evaluationCriteria: 是否清晰表达了一项核心竞争力
是否使用了具体技能或行为 + 实例或成果来支撑
是否避免空泛形容词（如 'hardworking', 'nice'），使用专业、可验证的表达

content.speakerText: Tell me about a time when your strength made a real difference in a project.
content.speakerTextCn: 说说你的一项优势是如何在某个项目中产生实际影响的。
expectedAnswers: My attention to detail caught a critical bug in the client’s data model before launch, saving us two weeks of rework and maintaining their trust.
I used my communication skills to mediate a conflict between design and engineering teams, which accelerated our sprint timeline by 40%.
I took the initiative to create a shared knowledge base after noticing team members were repeating the same mistakes—this reduced onboarding time by half.
evaluationCriteria: 是否准确回应了问题，聚焦于‘优势’和‘影响’
是否使用了具体情境（Situation）、行动（Action）和结果（Result）
是否使用了场景关键词如 'initiative', 'communication', 'efficiency', 'accuracy' 等

content.speakerText: How do you ensure you stay ahead in your field?
content.speakerTextCn: 你如何确保自己在领域中保持领先？
expectedAnswers: I dedicate at least 5 hours a week to learning new tools—I recently completed a certification in data visualization that improved my reporting efficiency by 30%.
I actively seek feedback and apply it quickly—I’ve improved my presentation skills by practicing with peers and iterating after every talk.
I follow industry leaders and test new methodologies in small projects first—I’ve implemented agile practices in two teams already.
evaluationCriteria: 是否体现持续学习或自我提升的主动态度
是否包含具体行动和可衡量的结果
是否使用了如 'certification', 'feedback', 'methodologies', 'implement' 等职场高频表达
